COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, you’ll learn how to negotiate with
suppliers to get the best possible quotes. Many
founders don’t know the extent to which you can
bargain for your product. Just implementing one of
the techniques I’m about to show you can save you
hundreds if not thousands of dollars.
The Double Spy Framework
❏ 	Approach two suppliers of a similar product.
❏ 	Get a quote from one you don’t intend to work
with.
❏ 	Drop it by 10%.
❏ 	Give the price to your dream supplier.
Pro Tips
1. 	Negotiate the down payment.
2. 	Meet your supplier in person.
3. 	Maintain a good relationship with your supplier.
4. 	Ask for a better payment term from the second
order on.
5. 	Include a quality policy in your contract.
6. 	Conduct quality control yourself of go with your
quality control team.
Standard Penalties
• 	Include 1% of hardware in the shipment in case
of damaged parts.
• 	Replenish the stock in the next shipment.
• 	Compensate 3x the cost.
LESSON:
NEGOTIATING WITH
SUPPLIERS
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Use my Double Spy Framework to find a quality
supplier with the best price.
❏ 	Craft or update your own QC Agreement to give to
your supplier.
“Suppliers like to hear that you’re in it for the long haul.”
